name: HUMANA.COM
message: [AI generated] Humana Inc. is a leading US-based health insurance company, founded in 1961. Its coverage extends across the country, providing a range of insurance products and health and wellness services. These include medical, dental, and vision insurance, along with pharmacy services and health information technology solutions. Humana largely focuses on senior citizens, especially those enrolled in Medicare. The company is keen on fostering healthy habits and promoting preventive care efforts.
